summary: Wired PhaseRecord through autopilot Layer 1 boundaries. Six handoff sites now populated. Backward-compat snapshot loading verified.

decisions.title: Bump LoopState schema_version to 2
decisions.rationale: Adding last_handoff_id field requires version increment so serialized snapshots can be migrated forward.

decisions.title: Use append_phase_entry shim rather than direct port
decisions.rationale: Out-of-tree callers still invoke the legacy API. Hard removal would break silently.

alternatives.alternative: Migrate snapshots eagerly at load time
alternatives.reason: Lazy backward-compat is simpler and avoids needing a migration runner.

trade_offs.reason: Shim is shallow (~10 lines) and DeprecationWarning makes the migration discoverable.

open_questions: Should append_phase_entry shim removal be conditional on a deprecation-warning grep across all consumers, or time-based?
completed_work: Added LoopState.last_handoff_id field with default None
Replaced _maybe_handoff description-string call with PhaseRecord assembly
Implemented build_phase_record() per-phase builders for all 9 _HANDOFF_BOUNDARIES pairs
Added handoff_id append to state.handoff_ids and state.last_handoff_id update
in_progress: Token instrumentation wiring at phase boundaries (phase_token_pre/post audit entries)
next_steps: Hand off to wp-autopilot-layer-2 for sub-agent isolation

relevant_files.description: _maybe_handoff modified at line 712; LoopState extended at line 64
